pages.text: $(o)"Extremes are disease — balance is the law."$()$(br2)$(#FFAA00)Arcanists$() are the oldest and most temperate school. They favor no single element, but understand every seam between them.

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Arcanist$()'s three balances:$(br2)1. $(l)Wisdom over power$()$(br)2. $(l)Temperance over accumulation$()$(br)3. $(l)Every school has its reason; the Arcanist knows the why$()$(br2)Triple-element practice: $(l)Holy$(), $(l)Light$(), $(l)Nature$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Born where the first $(l)Spell Workbench$() was raised. Early Arcanists compiled the $(l)Eighteenfold Treatise of Elements$(), still the standard initiation text.$(br2)Their mages are renowned generalists — never reaching the absolute peaks of specialist schools, which is both their limit and their composure.
